message:
Style: apply cargo fmt formatting for let-chains

Rustfmt reformats let-chain expressions:
- Place each condition on its own line with leading &&
- Opening brace on its own line after conditions
- Compact single-expression function calls

No functional changes.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
